ground_truth.basis: Brief misconception followed by explicit recovery

events.speaker: Kim
events.text: Maybe yes because both numbers got bigger.

events.speaker: Omar
events.text: I am confused about whether we add or multiply.

events.speaker: Mr. Diaz
events.text: Multiply both terms by the same factor; two times three is six and three times three is nine.

events.speaker: Kim
events.text: Got it, both terms need the same multiplier.
